summary.archival_abstract: Official technical documentation titled “Star Atlas Build.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Build / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
What is Star Atlas? | Star Atlas Build
Skip to contentStar Atlas BuildSearchK
Appearance
MenuReturn to top
What is Star Atlas? ​
Star Atlas is a next-gen sci-fi universe powered by the Solana blockchain, part MMO, part strategy game, part open economy.
It’s composed of several live and evolving products, this is what iswe have live today:
PLAY ​
Your main Star Atlas hub (play.staratlas.com)
Manage your ships, crew, DAC (guild), and NFT inventory
Enlist in Faction Fleet or Claim Stakes to earn passive rewards
Buy, sell, and trade assets on the Galactic Marketplace
Rent fleets or earn from yours with Fleet Rental
SAGE ​
A 4X browser-based game, fully on-chain
Mine, craft, and transport resources
Compete in faction-based economic strategy
All gameplay actions are signed and settled on Solana
Built for modular expansion by builders
DAO ​
Shape the future of the metaverse
Lock POLIS to gain voting power (PVP)
Vote on proposals, guide treasury usage, and ecosystem growth
Govern key parts of the Star Atlas economy
UE5 Game ​
A high-fidelity Unreal Engine 5 experience (Epic Games)
Fly your ships, explore space, race, and battle in multiplayer
Use your Crew NFTs as avatars
Mine asteroids and experience evolving gameplay modes
Fully free-to-play, with optional NFT integration\
For Builders ​
Star Atlas isn’t just a game, it’s a permissionless platform. Build tools, games, lore, assets, and businesses inside a decentralized, community-owned sci-fi metaverse and find immediate exposure to a large, committed, and growing community.
